diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,171 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: Context from src/context, parseAccept from src/utils/accept, AcceptHeader from src/utils/headers, acceptsConfig and acceptsOptions interfaces
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Parses Accept header and matches against supported MIME types or content types with user-defined matching logic
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: accepts.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Re-exports accepts helper for matching Accept headers
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Context from src/context, Runtime type
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light) and provides env bindings
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Context from src/context, parse/parseSigned/serialize/serializeSigned from src/utils/cookie, Cookie types from src/utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie utilities for reading, writing, generating, and deleting cookies including signed versions
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: types.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Re-export type GetConnInfo for retrieving connection info from context
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
+- Reads as: Context from src/context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Type definitions for connection info including remote address details
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Reads as: utility functions for CSS processing
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utility functions for building class names, minimizing CSS strings, and common CSS operations
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, rawCssString
+- Reads as: raw helper, DOM_RENDERER constant, createCssJsxDomObjects, common exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS style helper for creating and managing CSS classes and styles on Hono
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute from src/types, utils/color, utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting routes and displaying formatted route information
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, CreateHandlersInterface, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: Hono, HonoOptions, types (Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating and composing handlers and middleware with flexible typing for 1-10 handlers
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: html utilities from src/utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Simple HTML rendering helper supporting template strings with auto-escaping and callback support
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTPException, RequestHeader from src/utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for proxying requests with support for hop-by-hop header removal and strict RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context from src/context, GET_MATCH_RESULT constant, RouterRoute type, getPattern, splitRoutingPath from src/utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Route information helpers for retrieving matched routes, path, base paths, and base path with resolved parameters
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: stream from stream.ts, SSEMessage from sse.ts, streamText from text.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper with support for streams, server-sent events, and text streaming APIs
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming API with message formatting and event support
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: StreamingApi from src/utils/stream, isOldBunVersion from stream utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming response API for streaming content using ReadableStream
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: TEXT_PLAIN constant, streaming stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Safe summary: Plain text streaming helper with appropriate content-type and headers
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, disableSSG, onlySSG, ssgParams
+- Reads as: ssg.ts, middleware exports, plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: Re-exports SSG helper, middleware functions, and default plugins for Static Site Generation
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, Added
